zh.lifeSummary: 當Pernel Mare於大約1210年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親Philip Marc Sheriff of Nottingham31歲，母親Aline of Somerset27歲。她與Andrew Luttrell結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1267年在英國諾廷加姆爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pernel Mare于大约1210年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾时，她的父亲Philip Marc Sheriff of Nottingham31岁，母亲Aline of Somerset27岁。她与Andrew Luttrell结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1267年在英国諾廷加姆爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Americo, Cesareo, Fernando, Ines, Javier, Jose, Marcos.  Portuguese Henrique.  Italian Antonio, Gino, Olindo, Silvio, Vito.  Dutch Andries.
Italian: topographic name for someone living by the sea, from mare ‘sea’.

variants.name: Marucci
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Antonio, Silvio, Angelo, Carmela, Domenic, Donato, Egidio, Guido, Licinio, Lorenzo, Luciano.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Maruccio, a pet form of Mare or Mari .

variants.name: Marelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Giuseppe, Angelo, Dante.
patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Mare  .

variants.name: Mear
meanings: Mear, a field; also from mear or mearh, a horse

nameMeanings.name: Pernel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Common medieval simplified form of   Petronel  , occasionally revived in modern times as a given name.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Pernel Mare was born about 1210, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Philip Marc Sheriff of Nottingham, was 31 and her mother, Aline of Somerset, was 27. She married Andrew Luttrell. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1267, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pernel Mare est née environ 1210, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Philip Marc Sheriff of Nottingham, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Aline of Somerset, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Andrew Luttrell. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1267, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pernel Mare um 1210 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip Marc Sheriff of Nottingham 31 und ihre Mutter Aline of Somerset 27. Sie hat Andrew Luttrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1267 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pernel Mare è nata il circa 1210 nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Philip Marc Sheriff of Nottingham, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Aline of Somerset, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Andrew Luttrell. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1267, nel Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pernel Mareが約1210年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Philip Marc Sheriff of Nottinghamは31歳，母Aline of Somersetは27歳であった。Andrew Luttrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1267年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pernel Mare(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip Marc Sheriff of Nottingham(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline of Somerset(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Andrew Luttrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1267년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pernel Mare nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Philip Marc Sheriff of Nottingham, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Aline of Somerset, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Andrew Luttrell. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1267, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pernel Mare родилась около 1210 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Philip Marc Sheriff of Nottingham было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Aline of Somerset, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Luttrell. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1267 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pernel Mare nació aproximadamente 1210, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Philip Marc Sheriff of Nottingham, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Aline of Somerset, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Andrew Luttrell. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1267, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
